targets.rawSql:
SELECT date_trunc('day', start_time) AS "time", COUNT(*) AS "runs"
FROM jobs
WHERE status = 'completed' AND $__timeFilter(start_time)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Avg CPU p95 by job name

targets.rawSql:
SELECT job_id, ROUND(AVG((summary->>'cpu_percent_p95')::float)::numeric, 1) AS avg_cpu_p95
FROM jobs
WHERE status = 'completed' AND $__timeFilter(start_time)
GROUP BY job_id ORDER BY avg_cpu_p95 DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT COALESCE(summary->>'ci_platform', 'unknown') AS ci_platform, COUNT(*) AS runs
FROM jobs
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

panels.title: Average cost delta % by job (savings potential)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT job_id, ROUND(AVG((recommendations->0->>'cost_delta_percent')::float)::numeric, 1) AS avg_cost_delta_pct
FROM jobs
WHERE status = 'completed' AND recommendations != '[]' AND $__timeFilter(start_time)
GROUP BY job_id ORDER BY avg_cost_delta_pct ASC LIMIT 15

SELECT
  start_time AS "time",
  job_id,
  COALESCE(summary->>'ci_platform', '-') AS ci,
  summary->'detected_machine'->>'id' AS detected,
  recommendations->0->'machine'->>'id' AS recommended,
  ROUND((summary->>'cpu_percent_p95')::float::numeric, 1) AS cpu_p95,
  ROUND((summary->>'mem_used_gib_p95')::float::numeric, 2) AS mem_p95_gib,
  ROUND(duration_seconds::numeric, 0) AS duration_s,
  status
FROM jobs
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: P95 CPU over time per CI platform

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('day', start_time) AS "time",
  COALESCE(summary->>'ci_platform', 'unknown') AS metric,
  ROUND(AVG((summary->>'cpu_percent_p95')::float)::numeric, 1) AS avg_cpu_p95
FROM jobs
WHERE status = 'completed' AND $__timeFilter(start_time)
GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
